item.title: A Simple Fix for a Smoother Shop Day

item.title: A Small Forge Project in Plain Stock
item.description: A small forge project that turns plain stock into gear you’ll actually want to keep.

item.title: Restoring Old Chisels with Simple Steel Work
item.description: A simple restore that shows old steel can still have plenty left in it through careful tool restoration and blacksmithing.

media:content.media:title: Restoring Old Chisels with Simple Steel Work
media:content.media:description: A simple restore that shows old steel can still have plenty left in it through careful tool restoration and blacksmithing.

item.title: Learn to Bank Your Forge Fire
item.description: A calm, practical look at banking a forge fire to keep heat steady for blacksmithing and metalwork.
